revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24598347618|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Amekunitsuhikono Shrine]]
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Amekunitsuhikono Shrine
| native_name = 天国津彦神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Amekunitsuhikono Shrine
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Amekunitsuhikono Shrine'''|天国津彦神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echizen Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Q134917286|ltq=Q134917286|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Massha|lt=Massha|ja|末社|qid=Q135009906|1=Massha}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Echizen Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Echizen Province|ja|越前国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11636413|1=List of Shikinaisha in Echizen Province}}
** Series ordinal: 33
** P155: {{ill|Q135098992|ltq=Q135098992|qid=Q135098992|1=Isanahikono Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q135040141|ltq=Q135040141|qid=Q135040141|1=Amekunihimeno Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Echizen Province|lt=Echizen Province|ceb|Echizen|cs|Provincie Ečizen|de|Provinz Echizen|en|Echizen Province|es|Provincia de Echizen|fa|ولایت اچیزن|fr|Province d'Echizen|gl|Provincia de Echizen|id|Provinsi Echizen|it|Echizen (provincia)|ja|越前国|ko|에치젠국|lt|Ečidzeno žemė|nl|Echizen (provincie)|pt|Província de Echizen|ru|Этидзэн (провинция)|simple|Echizen Province|sk|Ečizen (provincia)|sr|Провинција Ечизен|tr|Echizen (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Етідзен|zh_min_nan|Etizen-kok|zh_yue|越前國|zh|越前國|qid=Q1047144|1=Echizen Province}}
* {{ill|Q11499560|ltq=Q11499560|qid=Q11499560|1=Tsuruga District, Fukui}}

* 182220
** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}
